items.title: States ask judge to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster
items.summary: A federal judge is officially being tasked with deciding whether to break up Live Nation-Ticketmaster. items.title: All of the updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s battle over OpenAI
items.summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. items.title: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI
items.summary: Firefox is getting a drastic visual overhaul with a redesigned Settings section that will make it easier to find and use privacy settings, including the switch for turning off all present and future AI features. items.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
items.summary: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

items.title: Philips’ new display has a screen on both sides

items.title: A 0.12% parameter add-on gives AI agents the working memory RAG can't
items.summary: AI agents forget. items.summary: RAG architectures are good at one thing: surfacing semantically relevant documents. That's also where they stop. items.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
items.summary: Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2.
